#set page(margin: 1in)
#set text(font: "New Computer Modern", size: 11pt)

#align(center, [
  #text(size: 1.5em, weight: "bold")[Inline and Display Mathematics]
  #v(0.5em)
  Source-backed grouped formula sample
])

= Expressions

*Expression 1.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ 1/(4!) integral_Lambda (d^4 vec(p)_1) / ((2 pi)^4) (d^4 vec(p)_2) / ((2 pi)^4) (d^4 vec(p)_3) / ((2 pi)^4) (d^4 vec(p)_5) / ((2 pi)^4) delta lambda_4(1235) delta^4(vec(p)_1 + vec(p)_2 + vec(p)_3 + vec(p)_5) hat(phi)_2(vec(p)_1) hat(phi)_2(vec(p)_2) hat(phi)_2(vec(p)_3) hat(phi)_2(vec(p)_5). $

*Expression 2.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ (partial T^(a b)) / (partial w_(i j)) = (partial T^(a b)) / (partial w_(j i)), (partial T^(a b)) / (partial w_(i j k)) = (partial T^(a b)) / (partial w_(j i k)), (partial T^(a b)) / (partial w_(i j k l)) = (partial T^(a b)) / (partial w_(j i k l)) = (partial T^(a b)) / (partial w_(i j l k)) = (partial T^(a b)) / (partial w_(j i l k)). $

*Expression 3.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ cal(W)^(upright(U)(1)) = partial_mu (delta) / (delta A_mu) + epsilon^(a b) (A_mu^a (delta) / (delta A_mu^b) + c^a (delta) / (delta c^b) + b^a (delta) / (delta b^b) + overline(c)^a (delta) / (delta overline(c)^b) + A_mu^(a*) (delta) / (delta A_mu^(b*)) + c^(a*) (delta) / (delta c^(b*))) . $

*Expression 4.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ q^(1/2 cal(E)(d)) sum_((d^bullet; d^infinity)) (-1)^(l(d^bullet)) q^(-chi(d^bullet) - chi(d^infinity, d^bullet) - cal(E)(d^bullet)) (product_(i=1)^(l(d^bullet)) (q^(-chi(d^i, d^i))) / ((q^(-1))_(d^i))) (q^(-cal(E)(d^infinity))) / ((q^(-1))_(d^infinity)^sigma), $

*Expression 5.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ phi_R arrow B' e^(-gamma a x) e^(gamma a L) (Gamma(2 gamma) Gamma(1 + 2 sigma)) / (Gamma(1 + gamma + sigma + lambda) Gamma(gamma + sigma - lambda)) + B' e^(gamma a x) e^(-gamma a L) (Gamma(-2 gamma) Gamma(1 + 2 sigma)) / (Gamma(1 - gamma + sigma - lambda) Gamma(-gamma + sigma - lambda)) $
